name: Idea_Tracker
description: This is a professional-grade Project Portfolio & Lifecycle API designed to manage the journey from initial inspiration to completed documentation. Built with a Node.js/Express backend and Prisma ORM, it provides a secure, layered environment for handling complex project data and binary assets.

scripts.setup:env:
node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const secret = require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'); const content = `PORT=8080
NODE_ENV=development
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:134@localhost:5432/idea_tracker
JWT_SECRET=${secret}
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=1h
`; if (!fs.existsSync('.env')) { fs.writeFileSync('.env', content); console.log('.env file created with a fresh JWT_SECRET.'); } else { console.log('.env already exists, skipping generation.'); }"

author: Lew Price
